message:
test(gui/overlay): pin clear_rendered_dirty_result on-present semantics (ft-1memj.28/E, ft-tszwp)

The bead description ("dirty rects cleared after frame present") maps
to the per-row clear_rendered_dirty_result(set, stable_idx) helper at
quickselect.rs:155 — the renderer calls it once per painted row inside
the with_lines_mut loop (callers at quickselect.rs:748, 842), not as a
single batched post-frame call. The end state is the same (every
painted row is clean) but the bookkeeping is per-row, so the test must
exercise the per-row contract.

Five new tests under the dirty_rect_clear_on_present_ prefix:

* dirty_rect_clear_on_present_removes_only_specified_row
    Clearing idx=5 must remove ONLY row 5 from {3, 5, 7, 10}; the rest
    stay queued for the renderer's next pass.
* dirty_rect_clear_on_present_splits_contiguous_range_around_cleared_row
    Clearing idx=12 from a contiguous [10..15] splits the set into
    [10..12, 13..15] — the bookkeeping the renderer relies on when a
    partial frame paints only some rows of a contiguous run.
* dirty_rect_clear_on_present_idempotent_for_already_clean_row
    Clearing a row that was never dirty is a no-op (no panic, no
    spurious mutation). Defends against double-clears after a redraw
    without re-marking.
* dirty_rect_clear_on_present_full_visible_loop_empties_viewport
    Simulates the renderer's actual present sequence: iterate every
    visible row 10..15 and clear it. The set ends with only the
    off-viewport [20..22] survivor — the in-viewport portion of the
    set is gone.
* dirty_rect_clear_on_present_leaves_offscreen_dirty_for_next_frame
    The crucial scrolling invariant: rows outside the rendered
    viewport (50..52, 200..201) MUST NOT be cleared by the present
    loop, so they're still painted when they next scroll into view.

No production change. Verified via:

  rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-cc6-target \
    CC=/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/bin/clang \
    CXX=/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/bin/clang++ \
    cargo test -p frankenterm-gui dirty_rect_clear

5 dirty_rect_clear_on_present_ tests pass. Closes the fifth and final
unit-test row in ft-1memj.28's GPU-unrequired list.
